title: 🔐 API Security Best Practices Your API is the front door to your application. If it's not secure, neither is your data. Here are the essentials every developer should follow 👇 🛡️ Validate every input 🔐 Authenticate users before every request 🚦 Authorize only what' - LinkedIn

🔐 API Security Best Practices Your API is the front door to your application. If it's not secure, neither is your data. Here are the essentials every developer should follow 👇 🛡️ Validate every input 🔐 Authenticate users before every request 🚦 Authorize only what' &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
